title: Gooey Indulgent Turkish Nutella Iskender Kebab
description: A decadent twist on traditional Kebab, with the rich flavors of Nutella and a gooey, caramelized exterior.
instructions: Combine melted beef suet, Nutella, and Kashkaval cheese in a bowl, mixing until smooth and creamy.
Add chopped rosemary and Mediterranean spices to the bowl, stirring until well combined.
Cut the pita bread into 4-6 pieces, depending on desired size.
Dip each piece of pita into the Nutella mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Cook the coated pita pieces for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and caramelized.
Serve the Iskender Kebab hot, garnished with toasted pumpkin seeds and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt.
Optional: serve with a side of whipped cream or vanilla ice cream for an added treat.
